name: Beam
slogan: Privacy-first web analytics. No cookies, no consent banners.
description: Beam is a lightweight, cookie-free, GDPR-compliant web analytics service built on Cloudflare Workers. Add a single 2KB script tag and get a clean dashboard with pageviews, referrers, countries, browsers, and devices — without cookies, consent banners, or sending data to Google. Free tier: 1 site, 5K pageviews/month. Pro: $5/month for unlimited sites and 100K pageviews.
